text.paragraph: Controls the symptoms of diarrhea, including Travelers diarrhea.
Allergy alert: Do not use if you have ever had a rash or other allergic reaction to Loperamide HCl

list.item: if you have bloody or black stool

section.title: Ask a doctor before use if you have
Ask a doctor or pharmacist before use if you are

list.item: tiredness, drowsiness or dizziness may occur
be careful when driving or operating machinery

section.title: Stop use and ask a doctor if

list.item: you get abdominal swelling or bulging. These may be signs of a serious condition.

code.displayName: OTC - PREGNANCY OR BREAST FEEDING SECTION

text.paragraph: If you are pregnant or breast feeding, ask a health professional before use.

code.displayName: OTC - KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN SECTION

text.paragraph: Keep this and all drugs out of the reach of children. In case of accidental overdose, contact a physician or Poison Control Center right away.

list.item: do not use more than directed
drink plenty of clear fluids to help prevent dehydration caused by diarrhea

text.paragraph: Adults and children (12 years and older): Take 2 caplets after the first loose stool followed by 1 caplet after each subsequent loose stool but no more than 4 caplets in 24 hours.
Children under 12 years: Do not give to children under 12 years of age.

list.item: do not use any opened or torn packet

text.paragraph: anhydrous lactose, croscarmellose sodium, crospovidone, D&C Yellow # 10, FD&C Blue # 1, hydrogenated vegetable oil, magnesium stearate, powdered cellulose, pregelatinized starch

section.title: Principal Display Panel - 200R Medique Diamode Label

text.paragraph: THIS PACKAGE IS FOR HOUSEHOLDS WITHOUT YOUNG CHILDREN

section.title: Private Label Distributor Physicians Care Anti-Diarrheal

text.paragraph: Registered Trademark of McNeil Consumer & Specialty Pharmaceuticals
Registered Trademark of ACME UNITED Corporation

section.title: Private Label Distributor Medex Anti-Diarrheal Relief Principal Display Panel

text.paragraph: Compare to the Active Ingredients in
This box contains a generic product called Diamode
Read Drug Facts and Instructions on Packet
